qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: Disk requests come to disk driver for cylinders and , in that order at a time when the disk drive is reading from cylinder . The seek time is msec per cylinder. Compute the total seek time if the disk arm scheduling algorithm is. A. First come first served. B. Closest cylinder next.
